hintDisplay: Sujeto: nosotros / Verbo: descargar (condicional) / Complemento: esa aplicación sospechosa / Verbo: deber (condicional) / Verbo: instalar (infinitivo) / Complemento: en tu dispositivo
spanishSentence: Si descargáramos esa aplicación sospechosa, no deberías instalarla en tu dispositivo.
correctSentence: If we downloaded that suspicious application, you should not install it on your device.

hints: Complemento: horas de tiempo de resolución de problemas
hintDisplay: Sujeto: el sistema / Verbo: reiniciar (condicional, acción hipotética) / Complemento: automáticamente / Sujeto: yo / Verbo: ahorrar (condicional, consecuencia hipotética) / Complemento: horas de tiempo de resolución de problemas
spanishSentence: Si el sistema se reiniciara automáticamente, yo ahorraría horas de tiempo de resolución de problemas.
correctSentence: If the system restarted automatically, I would save hours of troubleshooting time.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: los desarrolladores / Verbo: deber (obligación/necesidad) / Verbo: actualizar / Complemento: el software regularmente / Verbo: prevenir / Complemento: muchas vulnerabilidades de seguridad / Tiempo: condicional (si...entonces)
spanishSentence: Si los desarrolladores debieran actualizar el software regularmente, prevendrían muchas vulnerabilidades de seguridad.
correctSentence: If the developers should update the software regularly, they would prevent many security vulnerabilities.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: tú (you) / Verbo: necesitar (condicional) / Complemento: ayuda con la tecnología / Verbo: deber (condicional, obligación) / Verbo: instalar (infinitivo) / Complemento: un software antivirus confiable
spanishSentence: Si necesitaras ayuda con la tecnología, deberías instalar un software antivirus confiable.
correctSentence: If you needed help with technology, you should install a reliable antivirus software.

correctSentence: If I had better internet connection, I would not stream low-quality videos.

spanishSentence: Si tuvieras las credenciales adecuadas, yo podría configurar el servidor para manejar más tráfico.
correctSentence: If you had the proper credentials, I could configure the server to handle more traffic.

hints: Complemento: no podría recuperar mis datos

correctSentence: If the app crashed, I could not recover my data.

hints: Complemento: los errores en el software

correctSentence: If the developers had more resources, they might not fix the bugs in the software.

correctSentence: If I had advanced scanning technology, I would scan ancient artifacts to discover hidden secrets.

hints: Complemento: ayuda con la configuración de la red

correctSentence: If the technician were to set up the new server, you should ask for his assistance with the network configuration.

correctSentence: If you updated your smartphone software, you would have access to new features.

correctSentence: If the app had better features, it could not notify users incorrectly.

correctSentence: If the system loaded faster, I would travel the world without connectivity concerns.

correctSentence: If the app could sync automatically, I could manage my files more efficiently.
